description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named github-Linux that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple Linux distributions (fedora:latest, fedora:rawhide, ubuntu:latest) with different compilers (g++, clang++, icpc, icpx) and build types (Release, Debug). For each matrix combination, checkout the code, use a container with the specified distribution, and run a series of steps including caching, building with CMake, running tests, and installing the package.
